content.text: Good morning! Today is Monday, March 16, 2026. It's the first day of Sprint 7. We just finished our standup meeting this morning, and I've gathered some materials in the day01/ folder. Could you help me organize these materials and set up our sprint tracking files?

Good morning! Happy to help you get Sprint 7 started. I can see we're on day 1 (March 16, 2026) and you've collected some standup materials. Let me take a look at what's in the day01/ folder and help you organize everything properly. What would you like me to start with?
